name: Prof. Njuguna Ndung'u
qualifications: PhD Economics (University of Gothenburg), MA Economics (University of Nairobi)
experience: Cabinet Secretary, National Treasury and Economic Planning. Former Governor, Central Bank of Kenya. 30 years in monetary policy and public finance.

name: Dr. Chris Kiptoo
qualifications: PhD Economics (University of Nairobi), MSc Economics (University of Nairobi)
experience: Principal Secretary, National Treasury. Former Director, Kenya School of Government. 20 years in economic policy and public administration.

name: Haron Sirima
qualifications: MSc Public Finance (University of London), BA Economics (University of Nairobi)
experience: Director General, Budget Fiscal and Economic Affairs. 18 years in budget formulation and fiscal management.

name: Dr. Kamau Thugge
qualifications: PhD Economics (Johns Hopkins University), MA Economics (University of Nairobi)
experience: Governor, Central Bank of Kenya. Former Senior Advisor, IMF. 25 years in monetary policy and macroeconomic management.

name: Veronica Nduva
qualifications: MBA (Strathmore Business School), BCom Finance (University of Nairobi), CPA(K)
experience: Principal Secretary, State Department for Planning. 16 years in national planning and public investment management.
